description: The Ierinò or Jerinò are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioiosa Ionica, Calabria, Italy, involved in drug trafficking. They are also present in Ivrea, Salento, Borghesiana, and Pisticci. They are allied with the Mazzaferro, Cataldo, and Costa clans. The clan was involved in kidnappings in the 1970s and 1990s, including the 1975 kidnapping of Tobia Matarazzi and the 1993 killing of Vincenzo Mazzaferro.

country_links.evidence_quote: la droga viaggiava lungo l’asse Bolivia - Paesi Bassi - Romania - Santhià
country_links.context: The organization sourced cocaine from Bolivia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Roccisano, ... si trasferiva a Toronto in Canada , sotto la protezione di esponenti delle famiglie Aquino-Coluccio e Commisso , da anni radicate in quel Paese
country_links.context: A broker for the Ierinò moved to Toronto under protection of allied families.

country_links.context: Members of the organization were arrested in Spain as part of an international operation.

country_links.evidence_quote: successivamente, a New York , dove, su attivazione dell'Arma, in data 23 febbraio 2010 veniva tratto in arresto da personale della Dea
country_links.context: A broker for the Ierinò moved to New York and was arrested there.
